decision_framework_gap_closure_plan.why_it_blocks_client_grade: Candidate rows have short reasons and conditions but not a full candidate thesis, invalidation trigger, evidence horizon and authority-safe decision status.
required_evidence: explicit no-funding marker unless later authority exists
future_validator_expectation: every candidate row has thesis and invalidation text
no candidate is promoted without authority
no candidate is presented as funded unless funding_authority=true in a later authorized package
closure_sequence: collect evidence only in a later authorized package
surface thesis/invalidation in a later PDF surface update
decision_framework_gap_closure_plan.risk_if_skipped: The cockpit may look visually ready while lacking decision rationale and invalidation discipline.

input_state_contract_gap_closure_plan.why_it_blocks_client_grade: Not every candidate or investable row is ISIN-first or explicitly blocked as non-investable.
required_evidence: explicit non-UCITS or policy status where no UCITS ISIN applies
future_validator_expectation: every candidate or investable row is ISIN-first
non-UCITS rows are explicitly blocked or policy-review only
closure_sequence: map every candidate to ISIN or explicit block
surface identity in PDF after evidence exists
input_state_contract_gap_closure_plan.risk_if_skipped: Ticker-only rows can be confused with investable Dutch/EU UCITS holdings.

closure_sequence: expose in PDF evidence table later

closure_sequence: use only after later data authority

future_validator_expectation: every investable row has latest_close from an authorized pricing run
